prompt: Create a photorealistic high-fashion editorial portrait of a poised East Asian woman with warm bronze skin, almond-shaped eyes, glossy natural makeup, and black hair slicked into a low bun standing in a desert at twilight. She is shown in a vertical three-quarter back pose, turned over her shoulder to look directly at the camera with a calm, confident expression; one hand rests lightly near her collarbone and the other arm hangs relaxed by her side. She wears an elegant ivory-white draped gown with a low open back, soft ruched bodice, fitted skirt, and a long flowing scarf-like train falling from the shoulder down her back. The background is a softly blurred desert plain with sparse scrub and distant dark blue mountain silhouettes under a clear dusk sky fading from deep blue to pale lavender. Use cinematic natural twilight mixed with subtle soft front fill, emphasizing luminous skin highlights, gentle shadows, and the creamy texture of the fabric. Compose as a vertical fashion photograph, waist-to-thigh crop with the model centered slightly right, shallow depth of field, 85mm lens look, refined editorial mood, realistic skin texture, no text, no logos, no extra people.
promptEn: Create a photorealistic high-fashion editorial portrait of a poised East Asian woman with warm bronze skin, almond-shaped eyes, glossy natural makeup, and black hair slicked into a low bun standing in a desert at twilight. She is shown in a vertical three-quarter back pose, turned over her shoulder to look directly at the camera with a calm, confident expression; one hand rests lightly near her collarbone and the other arm hangs relaxed by her side. She wears an elegant ivory-white draped gown with a low open back, soft ruched bodice, fitted skirt, and a long flowing scarf-like train falling from the shoulder down her back. The background is a softly blurred desert plain with sparse scrub and distant dark blue mountain silhouettes under a clear dusk sky fading from deep blue to pale lavender. Use cinematic natural twilight mixed with subtle soft front fill, emphasizing luminous skin highlights, gentle shadows, and the creamy texture of the fabric. Compose as a vertical fashion photograph, waist-to-thigh crop with the model centered slightly right, shallow depth of field, 85mm lens look, refined editorial mood, realistic skin texture, no text, no logos, no extra people.
promptZh: 创作一张照片级逼真的高级时尚杂志风格人像，主角为 一位姿态优雅的东亚女性，拥有温暖的古铜色皮肤、杏仁眼、光泽感自然妆容，黑色长发梳成低发髻，站在暮色下的沙漠中。画面呈现垂直的三分之四背影姿态，她转过头看向镜头，表情冷静自信；一只手轻放在锁骨附近，另一只手臂自然下垂。她身穿 一件优雅的象牙白色垂坠长裙，采用低露背设计、柔软的褶皱胸衣、修身裙摆，以及一条从肩部垂落至背后的长款飘逸丝巾式裙摆。背景是柔和虚化的沙漠平原，点缀着稀疏的灌木，远处是深蓝色山峦的剪影，天空呈现从深蓝渐变至淡紫色的清澈暮色。采用电影感的自然暮光结合微妙的柔和正面补光，强调皮肤的通透高光、柔和阴影以及织物的细腻质感。构图为垂直时尚摄影，腰部至大腿的取景，模特位于画面中偏右位置，浅景深，85mm 镜头效果，精致的杂志风格，真实的皮肤纹理，无文字，无 Logo，无其他人物。
